config.title: Karta produktu #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'GetCurrentFirma #include "50203"
'HARUI_PRICE #include "50101"
#include "50523"
'pozycja opakowania (domyślnie 1) dim nLP : nLP = clng(1) 'max pozycja opakowania dim nMaxLP
function fopen 'max lp dla opakowania dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors("select isnull(max(coll_lp),0) from vlist_n5produkt_listOpakowania where p_idobj = " +_ cstr(page_.root.idobj)) nMaxLP = clng(oRS(0).value)
pagePanel1 pagePanel2 pagePanel3 pagePanel4
fopen = true end function
'--------------------- 'Informacje podstawowe '--------------------- sub pagePanel1
dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = page_.root dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_PANEL_1)).newrow.newcell.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1).element pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable) 'nazwa produktu pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext("Nazwa produktu").element.bold = true pTB.cell.width = clng(5000) pTB.newcell.addtext pProdukt.strNazwa 'indeks produktu pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext("Indeks produktu").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pProdukt.strIndeks
#ifdef _TORAL pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext("Położenie w magazynie").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pProdukt.prod_strNazwaObcojezyczna3 #endif
'stawka VAT pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext("Stawka VAT").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext vat2name(pProdukt.eVat) end sub
'------------------- 'Zdjęcie i nawigacja '------------------- sub pagePanel2 dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = page_.root dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_PANEL_2)).newrow.newcell.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1).element pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable) dim pOpak : set pOpak = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(nLP)
'Lp, opakowanie, kod kreskowy pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext("Lp").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Opakowanie").element.bold = true pTB.cell.colspan = 2 pTB.newcell.addtext("Kod kreskowy").element.bold = true pTB.cell.colspan = 2
pTB.newrow pTB.newcell pTB.cell.width = clng(1000) pTB.newcell pTB.cell.width = clng(1000) pTB.newcell pTB.cell.width = clng(5000) pTB.newcell pTB.cell.width = clng(5000) pTB.newcell pTB.cell.width = clng(2000)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATIC, -1 with pTB.element .text = CStr(nLP) .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_OPAK_LP) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_LEFT
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATIC, -1 with pTB.element .text = pOpak.strNazwa .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_OPAK_NAZWA) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_LEFT pTB.cell.colspan = 2
pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_STATIC, -1 with pTB.element .text = pOpak.strEAN .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_OPAK_EAN) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_LEFT pTB.cell.colspan = 2
pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 19 pTB.newcell.addtext(" ") pTB.cell.colspan = 2
'zdjęcie produktu pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, CTRLID_OPAK_ZDJECIE with pTB.element .scalingmode = 1 .width = ZDJECIE_WIDTH .height = ZDJECIE_HIGHT .border = 1 .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") end with
with pTB.cell .rowspan = 4 .colspan = 2 .backcolor = COLOR_CARD .align = ALIGN_CENTER .width = clng(10000) end with
pTB.newcell pTB.cell.rowspan = 2
pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 19 pTB.newcell.addtext(" ") pTB.cell.colspan = 2
pTB.newrow 'strzałka w lewo pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1 with pTB.element .image = CLng(80985) .width = MINIMIZE_SIZE .height = MINIMIZE_SIZE set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunction='prevOpak'") end with pTB.cell.backcolor = COLOR_CARD pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.cell.colspan = 2
'strzałka w prawo pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1 with pTB.element .image = CLng(80986) .width = MINIMIZE_SIZE .height = MINIMIZE_SIZE set .hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunction='nextOpak'") end with pTB.cell.backcolor = COLOR_CARD pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_LEFT
pTB.newrow.newcell pTB.newcell end sub
'--------------- 'stan magazynowy '--------------- sub pagePanel3 dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = page_.root dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_PANEL_3)).newrow.newcell.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1).element pPlugInTable.border = 1 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.row.border = 1 pTB.newcell.addtext("Magazyn") pTB.element.width = clng(6000) pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość") pTB.element.width = clng(2000)
'pobierz do pElement aktualne opakowanie dim pElement : set pElement = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(nLP)
dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors( doc_.getmodule(60300).bqry_stan_mag_for_prod_opak(pProdukt.idobj, pElement.idobj , "-1")) dim ilosc, prec, skrot, magazyn if oRS.EOF then pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext("brak na magazynach") pTB.cell.colspan = 2 else while not oRS.eof ilosc = ccur(oRS.fields("c_ilosc_opak").value) prec = clng(oRS.fields("c_prec_opak").value) - 1 skrot = cstr(oRS.fields("c_jedn_opak").value) magazyn = cstr(oRS.fields("c_mag").value) ilosc = doc_.afc.display.quantity(ilosc,skrot,prec) pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext(magazyn).newcell.addtext(ilosc) pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT oRS.movenext wend end if end sub
sub refreshPanel3 doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_PANEL_3)).removeall pagePanel3 end sub
'---------------- 'ceny kartotekowe '---------------- sub pagePanel4 dim pProdukt : set pProdukt = page_.root dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_PANEL_4)).newrow.newcell.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1).element pPlugInTable.border = 1 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pPlugInTable.body.bordercolor = rgb(255,255,255) pPlugInTable.body.border = 1
dim idWaluta : idWaluta = GetCurrentFirma().pWaluta.idobj
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 1 pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext("Cena") pTB.cell.width = clng(5000) pTB.newcell.addtext("Netto") pTB.cell.width = clng(3250) pTB.newcell.addtext("Brutto") pTB.cell.width = clng(3250)
'pobierz do pElement aktualne opakowanie dim pElement : set pElement = pProdukt.listOpakowania.get(nLP)
with doc_.afc.display if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_1) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA1_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA1_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto1), pElement.pWaluta.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto1), pElement.pWaluta.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.pWaluta.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto1 , pElement.pWaluta end if end if end if if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_2) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA2_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA2_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto2), pElement.opak_pWaluta2.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto2), pElement.opak_pWaluta2.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.opak_pWaluta2.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto2 , pElement.opak_pWaluta2 end if end if end if if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_3) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA3_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA3_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto3), pElement.opak_pWaluta3.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto3), pElement.opak_pWaluta3.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.opak_pWaluta3.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto3 , pElement.opak_pWaluta3 end if end if end if if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_4) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA4_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA4_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto4), pElement.opak_pWaluta4.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto4), pElement.opak_pWaluta4.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.opak_pWaluta4.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto4 , pElement.opak_pWaluta4 end if end if end if if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_5) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA5_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA5_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto5), pElement.opak_pWaluta5.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto5), pElement.opak_pWaluta5.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.opak_pWaluta5.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto5 , pElement.opak_pWaluta5 end if end if end if if not HARUI_PRICE(UAR_DOSTEP_CENA_KARTOTEKOWA_6) then if getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA6_NAME) <> "" then pTB.newrow pTB.row.fontsize = 7 pTB.newcell.addtext(getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_CENA6_NAME)) pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaNetto6), pElement.opak_pWaluta6.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(nx_.display.quantity(CCur(pElement.curCenaBrutto6), pElement.opak_pWaluta6.strSkrot,trans_.var(GVAR_PRICE_PREC))).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if pElement.opak_pWaluta6.idobj <> idWaluta then pokaz_przeliczenie pTB , pElement.curCenaBrutto6 , pElement.opak_pWaluta6 end if end if end if end with end sub
sub refreshPanel4 doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_PANEL_4)).removeall pagePanel4 end sub
'------------------------- 'przełączanie zdjęć w lewo '------------------------- function prevOpak if nLP > 1 then nLP = nLP - 1 refreshPanel3 refreshPanel4 end if end function
'-------------------------- 'przełączanie zdjęć w prawo '-------------------------- function nextOpak if nLP < nMaxLP then nLP = nLP + 1 refreshPanel3 refreshPanel4 end if end function
function c##CTRLID_OPAK_LP##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl) : c##CTRLID_OPAK_LP##_ongetdata=true if not page_.root.listOpakowania.get(nLP) is nothing then pCtrl.value = CStr(nLP) end if end function
function c##CTRLID_OPAK_ZDJECIE##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl): c##CTRLID_OPAK_ZDJECIE##_ongetdata = true if not page_.root.listOpakowania.get(nLP) is nothing then dim pOpak : set pOpak = page_.root.listOpakowania.get(nLP) with page_.ctrl(CTRLID_OPAK_ZDJECIE) if pOpak.field("opak_fZdjecie").isEmpty() then .image = clng(PICTURE_MISSING) else set .image = nothing set .image = pOpak.field("opak_fZdjecie") end if end with end if end function
function c##CTRLID_OPAK_NAZWA##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl) : c##CTRLID_OPAK_NAZWA##_ongetdata=true if not page_.root.listOpakowania.get(nLP) is nothing then dim pOpak : set pOpak = page_.root.listOpakowania.get(nLP) pCtrl.value = pOpak.strNazwa end if end function
function c##CTRLID_OPAK_EAN##_ongetdata(byref pCtrl) : c##CTRLID_OPAK_EAN##_ongetdata=true if not page_.root.listOpakowania.get(nLP) is nothing then dim pOpak : set pOpak = page_.root.listOpakowania.get(nLP) pCtrl.value = pOpak.strEAN end if end function
